name: domus-studio
description: DOMUS Studio Premium 7.3: AI vizualizator realnych fotografii, potvrzovany projektovy asistent a kompletni manual.

scripts.test:unit: node tests/core-tests.mjs && node tests/premium-tests.mjs && node tests/vendor-module-tests.mjs && node tests/build-output-tests.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run analyze:architecture && npm run test:unit && npm run test:static && npm run test:powershell
scripts.check: npm run check:generated && npm run test:unit && npm run test:static && npm run test:powershell
